scene.message: Maki: Wait!{nl} ...Ugh! She got away again.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...Just who is that{nl} child...?{waitkey}{ret}
Yosuke: Everyone, are you{nl} all right?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Yosuke!{nl} Are you okay?!{waitkey}{ret}
Yosuke: Yeah. Thanks to you,{nl} the school's back to normal.{waitkey}Thank you.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: You're welcome.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Why?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: We're going somewhere{nl} again?! Let's take a break.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Then shall we leave you{nl} behind by yourself, Ayase?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Don't mind it.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}Don't bother{nl} with me...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Well, whatever.{nl} Let's get going then, {ctl0f:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}I told you{nl} not to bother with me.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: ...{wait_fr:60}Oh, I'm sorry.{nl} I was lost in thought.{waitkey}{ret}
